metadata.description: Radial-sided carpal bone with retrograde blood supply and snuffbox tenderness landmark.

metadata.claim_text: Shared hand-wrist anatomy (distal-ulna, tfcc, druj) links Ulnar Styloid Fracture to adjacent Prepare neighborhoods in the cluster graph.
Treating ulnar styloid fracture in isolation without checking related wrist, tendon, or nerve neighborhoods in the cluster.
Ulnar Styloid Fracture evaluation should anchor on mechanism, focused exam, and the anatomic structures most at risk (distal-ulna, tfcc, druj).
Missing distal-ulna assessment in ulnar styloid fracture is a common board and OITE trap.
Document neurovascular status, key anatomic structures (distal-ulna, tfcc, druj), stability assessment, and escalation plan for ulnar styloid fracture.
